texts.label: Bank Phishing SMS
texts.content: ALERT: Your SBI account has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access, verify immediately: http://sbi-verify-in.tk/login?acc=9XXXX. Do not ignore or your account will be permanently blocked. - SBI Security Team

texts.label: Army Impersonation Email
texts.content: Dear Sir/Ma'am, This is from Army HQ IT Cell. Your email password expires today. Please update immediately at https://army-mail-reset.co/update to avoid service disruption. — IT Helpdesk

texts.label: WhatsApp Welfare Scam
texts.content: Congratulations! You have been selected for the Indian Army Welfare Fund scheme. You will receive Rs 2,50,000. To claim, send your service number, Aadhaar, and bank account details to armywelfare2026@gmail.com

texts.label: Safe Message — Routine
texts.content: Reminder: PT parade tomorrow at 0600 hours at the main ground. All personnel to carry service ID. - Unit Adjutant
